name: Titania Prime
description: Tempting and terrifying, this is Titania in her ultimate form.
passiveDescription: Titania generates Health for herself and nearby allies every time she casts an Ability.

abilities.name: Spellbind
abilities.description: Enemies fumble their weapons as they are whisked into the air. Nearby allies become immune to Status Effects. Hold the ability to cast the immunity onto Titania.

abilities.name: Tribute
abilities.description: Cycle through and extract one of the four Buffs when cast on an enemy. Thorns reduces incoming damage. Dust degrades enemy accuracy. Full Moon increases companion damage. Entangle slows enemies within range.

abilities.name: Lantern
abilities.description: Create a swarm of razorflies that transform an enemy into an irresistible floating beacon, attracting witless comrades before exploding on command.

abilities.name: Razorwing
abilities.description: Shrink down and take flight, while razorflies attack nearby enemies and amplify the damage they take.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Tempting and terrifying, this is Titania in her ultimate form.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Titania Prime Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Titania Prime Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Titania Prime Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Baruuk Prime: Hotfix 32.2.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania’s Tribute not transforming enemies into beacons and applying buffs. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1333706-titania-bug/?ct=1670350493

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes:
Was: Hitting at least 4 enemies with Spellbind will grant Titania 50 Energy. 
The 100% damage bonus now applies to all weapons (including Titania’s Dex Pixia and Diwata) and scales with Ability Strength.
Fixed Titania in Razorwing being able to enter into large structures in the Plains of Eidolon. 
Fixed Titania in Razorwing being able to fly under a walkway in the Infested Ship tileset and losing all function.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed enemies instantly dying when casting Mag’s Pull on enemies that are affected by Titania’s Spellbind. 
Fixed magazine capacity from Mods reverting when turning Titania’s Razorwing on and off. 
Fixed crash when hovering over Titania’s Razorwing ability UI. 
Fixed falling and teleporting endlessly after falling down a walkway and attempting to fly out using Titania’s Razorwing in the Infested Ship tileset.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania being able to teleport past the locked Deacon doors while in Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Archons now prioritize players instead of summons (eg: Octavia's roller, Titania's Razorflies, Atlas Rumblers, etc) to prevent too egregious aggro CC.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Titania Blueprint
Titania’s Moyturan Wings auxiliary attachment from the Donann skin will now flap when she is in Razorwing mode.  
Note: If equipped on Titania Prime, her Primed energy wings will not appear.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Titania’s Razorflies always facing the same direction. They should be more dynamic now! 
Fixed Titania’s Razorflies triggering the effect of the Secondary Deadhead and Pax Seeker Arcanes. 
Fixed being able to fly around after being downed as Titania while Razorwing is active, which was also causing loss of functionality.
Fixed Titania being unable to use Blink while in Razorwing when Guardian Shell is active. 
Fixed being able to escape the Uranus Sealab tileset using Titania’s Razorwing. 
Fixed players being able to still fly when being downed as Titania during the Razorwing cast animation.

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Hotfix 31.7.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed numerous level holes in a certain Zariman tileset room that could be escapacble with Titania.

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Update 31.7
patchlogs.changes:
Assume the lethal form of a lustrous midnight. This collection includes the Titania Donann skin, Titania Moyturan Wings, the Aerospri Dex Pixia Skin, the Hawth Diwata Skin, and the Raylta Syandana.
Includes the Titania Moyturan Wings, Aerospri Dex Pixia Skin, and Hawth Diwata Skin when purchased.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Titania’s Razorwing where the Razorflies would not appear to spawn.

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania being able to clip through geometry by spamming Razorwing in certain cases.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixing Wisp and Titania’s animation sets not floating while having the Hespar equipped.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Titania appearing invisible in a cinematic during a key moment in The Second Dream quest. 
Fixed Titania in Razorwing causing issues in the Second Dream quest cinematic sequences.

patchlogs.name: Garuda Prime: Update 31.3
patchlogs.changes:
Titania Prime
Replaced Arbiters of Hexis Sacrifice of Titania Prime Neuroptics to Gara Prime Chassis
Replaced New Loka Sacrifice of Titania Prime Systems to Nezha Prime Chassis

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.changes: Titania Pixialyst Skin by kakarrot2812

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed running out of energy in Razorwing while in Operator results in Titania being permanently small and breaks movement.

patchlogs.name: Update 31: The New War
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Titania’s Solstice skin missing the ‘Prime Details’ toggle. 
Fixed Titania’s Razorwing kills in normal ground missions counting toward the ‘From On High’ Challenge progress.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.additions: Added new animations to Wisp and Titania’s move set when using Gunblades.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed rapidly toggling Titania’s Razorwing mode/Operator allowing you to clip through geometry.
Fixed the Cremata Syandana on Titania Prime appearing flipped and bigger after using Razorwing.
Fixed movement momentum carrying over when using Transference while Titania is in Razorwing. 
Fixed Wisp Reservoir buffs and Sevagoth Gloom FX affecting Titania’s Razorflies.

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Xaku, Titania and Gara not having a Blueprint hint button in the Market.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.changes: Replaced Arbiters of Hexis Sacrifice of Atlas Prime Systems with Titania Prime Helmet.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue where Titania’s Razorwing was unable to deal damage to Nullifier-type Corpus Capture targets.
Fixed Titania being able to get out of bounds with entering/exiting Razorwing.
Fixed Titania being unable to descend while in Razorwing form, after being propelled by the gaiser plants in Deimos.
Fixed an issue with dual wielding a Glaive/Pistol as Titania before activating Razorwing enabling permanent slide attacks when using quick melee.
Fixed performance issues when using Thermal Sunder as Titania after casting Razorwing as Host.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Titania Tribute

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.6

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Update 30
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies unable to target Titania when Reave (via Helminth Subsume) is cast while Razorwing is active.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack

Fixed custom walk and roll animations for Wisp and Titania not working while walking around the Orbiter, Dojo, and Railjack.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a rare case of an infinite white screen after casting Titania’s Razorwing in the Simulacrum.
Fixed Titania appearing absolutely gigantic when using Omni Tool to return to Railjack in Razorwing after blowing up enemy ship, as reported here: https://www.reddit.com/r/Warframe/comments/ea4m8a/titania_is_so_big_so_i_stuck_inside_a_ship/?utm_source=reddit-android
Fixed reticle turning and staying red in the Nihil boss fight while playing as Titania. 
Fixed rare cases where you could summon your Arch-Gun while in Titania’s Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: TennoGen: 29.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zenistar disc not expiring when in Titania’s Razorwing mode.

Fixed a script error when casting Titania’s Tribute ability.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix: 29.2.2
patchlogs.changes: Updated Ivara's Quiver, Vauban's Minelayer, Xaku's The Lost, and Titania's Tribute ability descriptions to list the sub-abilities and a brief general description of what they do. Tips related to these sub-abilities for each Warframe have also been edited for accuracy as a result.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Titania’s Tribute ability.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: TennoGen: 29.2.1

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29.1.0
patchlogs.fixes:

Fixed ability to go under the floor with a combination of Transference and Titania’s Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed potential crash when casting Titania’s Lantern ability.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Update 28.1.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a few more cases where Titania could clip through the floor in Razorwing.
Fixed movement sound looping for Titania Prime.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.6 + 28.0.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Djinn automatically Reviving after exiting Titania's Razorwing if Reawaken is equipped.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Dessicata Syandana appearing to float away from Nova, Saryn, and Titania.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Titania’s Razorwing Ability.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a few script errors that could occur when deactivating Titania’s Razorwing Ability.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Shield Lancers flailing wildly when affected by Titania’s Lantern. 
Fixed Archwing Blink FX (including Titania’s Razorwing) not using chosen Energy colors. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1194097-blink-should-abide-by-energy-colour/

patchlogs.name: Nightwave Series 3: Glassmaker: Hotfix 27.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania Prime’s lateral dodges not moving you as far as they should.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave Series 3: Glassmaker: Hotfix 27.5.2

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Titania’s Lantern ability.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Hotfix 27.4.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania Prime not playing proper movement and dash sounds when equipped with Skins.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Hotfix 27.4.2
patchlogs.changes: Removed inaccurate information found in the in-game Market tooltip for Titania Prime Accessories.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes:
Titania 
Titania 
Titania Prime has been given her own unique dodge/roll animations that flow better with her floating movement! As requested here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1181409-please-add-new-dash-animation-to-titania-prime/ 
Titania can no longer play the Shawzin while in Razorwing due to it resulting in a very broken flying state.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Ability Range Mods not affecting Titania’s Lantern ability.
Fixed a case of Titania’s motion/animations breaking when going in and out of Razorwing.
Fixed being all kinds of broken if you enter Sharkwing areas as Titania in her Razorwing mode. 
Fixed missing reticle when Transferring to Operator while in Titania’s Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.15 + 27.3.15.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Titania’s Tribute ability.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.14
patchlogs.changes: Titania Primes Razorwing Energy wings will now be hidden when aiming to avoid blocking your sight.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Motus Impact not extending the Melee range of Titania’s Diwata.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.11
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Step-based Ephemeras not working on Titania Prime. 
Fixed Titania’s Thorns Tribute not reducing damage taken by the player.
Fixed Titania’s Full Moon buff not applying to her Razorflies.
Fixed Titania’s Reticle missing when entering Operator Mode from Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.10
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed some missing FX on Titania’s Tribute ability.
Fixed a script error when joining-in-progress on a Titania with multiple Tribute buffs active.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Prevented frozen in time (Atlas Petrify, Limbo Stasis etc) enemies from being affected by Titania’s Lantern. The Energy spent to cast will be refunded if the cast fails.
This fixes casting Titania Lantern on an enemy that is frozen in time, resulting in the ability appearing to cast (costs Energy, performs animation) but the target enemy is not affected.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.8 + 27.3.8.1 + 27.3.8.2
patchlogs.changes: Removed Titania’s Exalted weapons appearing in the Codex Weapon section, as Exalted Weapons do not show here.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Titania Prime’s energy wings not applying to her Razorwing when other Skins are equipped.
Fixed Titania’s Ironclad Flight Augment not functioning. 
Fixed Titania/Grendel buff wheels showing up when the ability has not been unlocked yet. Also fixed the buffs being greyed out until you leveled up enough.
Fixed a script error when casting Titania’s Tribute.
Fixed enemies becoming immune to all Status Effects when Titania’s Lantern and Spellbind is cast on them.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Titania Prime 27.3.7
patchlogs.changes:
Operation: Scarlet Spear: Titania Prime 27.3.7:
Titania has had a history of clipping with Syadanas due to her wingspan features, and when designing her Gigelorum Prime Syandana it became apparent that it wasn’t going to sit right on her features. Considering it can look awesome on other Warframes, we started work on the shorter Gigelor Prime Syandana that will position nicely with Titania Prime’s features!
We’ve made some slight collision and offset tweaks to have the Gigelorum Prime Syandana sit nicer between Titania’s wings.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Titania Prime 27.3.6
patchlogs.changes:
: Scarlet Spear: Titania Prime 27.3.6:
You can find Titania Prime, Corinth Prime, and Pangolin Prime Relics in their classic spots (Void, Derelict, Defense, Survival, etc) with the addition of Railjack missions. PLUS the Relic rewards from Ground Assault and Murex Raid missions have been replaced by these new Relics in Operation: Scarlet Spear. Check your in-game Codex for Relic drop locations!
Get the newest Prime gear with Titania Prime Access and Prime Accessories here: https://www.warframe.com/prime-access
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed melee magnetism not functioning with Titania's Diwata in Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.changes:
Further performance improvements towards Titania’s Lantern when cast on a large group of enemies. This particularly affected systems set to Low Particle Quality.
Grendel’s Nourish now mimic’s Titania’s Tribute buff selector.
If you’re unfamiliar with Titania’s Tribute buff selector, this means that Nourish is a tap to cycle/select buff and hold to cast. This is a reverse of how it functioned prior to this Update.
Titania has a new Passive: Titania generates Health for herself and nearby Allies every time she casts an Ability (4hp/second for 20 seconds)! The personal Titania Parkour Boost is staying, just the communal Trampoline isn't.
Titania can now use Blink while in her Razorwing ability!
Fixed casting Titania’s Razorwing right as you fall into a teleport volume in the Simulacrum resulting in an infinite white screen.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Titania’s Tribute ability not extracting an offering from an enemy in the form of an Ability Buff.
Fixed Titania and Hildryn gaining 100% Damage reduction while in their airborne forms (Razorwing, Aegis Storm) when equipped with Aviator, Aerodynamic, and Agility Drift.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed gaining max Health and Shields, Power Strength and presumably any other Archwing-specific bonuses while using Titania’s Razorwing mode in Railjack.
Fixed various collision issues in the Railjack that allowed Titania to exit the railjack while in Razorwing.
Titania: 65 to 100
Razorwing has a new FX upgrade! (As mentioned in Titania Changes)
Optimized the effects on Titania's Lantern ability to improve performance.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Cycuta Prime Sigil, Igaro, Yamako Prime, Zaikhya, Cycuta Prime, and Opulas Robe Syandanas clipping through the Titania Empress Skin. 
Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker and Titania’s Razorwing deactivating Melee-only mode if it was active before those abilities were cast.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Kuva Lich Changes 27.1.0 + 27.1.0.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed overwhelming Elemental FX on Titania when she is given an Elemental buff. 
Fixed the Cautious Shot Mod stacking each time you enter/exit Titania’s Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.4
patchlogs.fixes:
More fixes towards Syandanas clipping into Titania’s Empress Skin.
Fixed two different weapon sounds being heard when firing Titania’s Dex Pixia with the Hawkmoth Skin equipped.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Hotfix 26.1.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Archwing boost sound playing when using Titania’s Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Hotfix 26.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Titania now uses the new Archwing flight model. This fixes her current situation of being very janky while in Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Update 26.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed firing and reload animations for Titania’s Hawkmoth Skin for her Dex Pixia exalted weapon.
Fixed counter for Razorflies missing for Client Titanias until one is either killed or spawned.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Further tweaks for Titania’s Empress Razorwing Skin to address cloth issues.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.4 + 26.0.4.1

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Archwing Melee attacks (including Titania's Razorwing) now properly home in on their targets again.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Titania Razorwing not showing the number of Razorflies active after returning from Operator.
Fixed Titania’s Dendrite Gunblade Skin missing its FX.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania’s Skirt not being attached in Razorwing. How lewd.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.changes:
The trappings of royalty. Includes the deluxe Titania Empress Skin, Hawkmoth Skin for the Dex Pixia exalted weapon, the Mot Skin for the Diwata sword, Titania’s Heartwood Armor Set and the Dendrite Gunblade Skin.
Titania can now Transfer to the Operator during Razorwing.
Titania’s cast animations are now an upper body animation only (except Razorwing), alleviating momentum cancelling lower body animations and trimming cast time.
Titania can spawn up to four more Razorflies if all Tributes are active, one per Tribute.
Enemies directly affected by Titania’s Lantern will now have any damage they take dealt to them when the Ability ends (a la Mind Control).
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania’s Dex Pixia not being equipped if Razorwing is cast while holding an Arch-Gun.

patchlogs.name: Arbitrations Revisited: Hotfix 25.7.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed exploit with Titania’s Razorwing and Syndicate weapons.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania being spawned inside the ground sometimes when scoring in The Index while in Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.4.1 + 25.4.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to move properly when Titania is in Razorwing in Sanctuary Onslaught.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania’s Diwata not functioning when attempting to Melee in Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed buffs/debuffs permanently stacking on Zaws after activating and deactivating Titania's Archwing. A common result was melee speed getting slower and slower. Now you'll be slow no mo'!

Titania’s Dex Pixia + Diwata
Titania’s Dex Pixia now uses Secondary Mods! More on that in the Titania Exalted Weapons Dev Workshop we posted at the beginning of this week.
Increased Titania’s Diwata damage to 200, Critical Chance to 20% and Critical Multiplier to 2x.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed popping lens flare in Titania’s diorama.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania's bullet jump area of effect buff FX not showing up.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a script error with Titania’s Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Arcanes working inconsistently on Exalted Abilities (Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, etc) or Weapon Abilities (Titania’s Razorwing, etc).

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.12.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed toggle sprint preventing Titania’s Razorwing from being able to ascend.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.10.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania Razorwing augment adding infinite lasting buffs when casting abilities after entering and immediately exiting Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Warframe Specters are now much smarter! If you don't recall, Specters are craftable gear you can equip to summon an AI companion in battle. We've done a general intelligence pass on their proficiency with Weapons, and we've also updated their power-casting logic. Virtually every power is now castable with only a few exceptions! Specters CANNOT cast the following Abilities: Vauban's Minelayer, Ivara's Zipline, Titania's Razorwing, Nekros’ Desecrate and Shadows of the Dead, Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, Valkyr’s Hysteria, Wukong’s Primal Fury, Cloud Walker, and Defy, Atlas’ Petrify and Tectonics, Limbo's entire kit (save for the damage aspect of Banish), and finally Zephyr’s Dive Bomb.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania ability script errors when entering the Simulacrum Arsenal while they are active.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.6.0 + Hotfix 22.6.0.1

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Incubus Ribbon not applying correctly to Titania with the Titania Unseelie Skin equipped

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.1.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a script error related to Titania’s Razorwing ability. 
Fixed an incorrect material on Titania’s Unseelie Skin Tennogen skin.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Titania's Spellbind disarm duration reduced to 4 seconds in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Syandanas not scaling when Titania casts Razorwing. 
Fixed Nave Syandana clipping through Titania’s wings.
Fixed Switch Teleport causing Titania to clip through floors.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania’s Razorwing ability jittering out of control at lower framerates when boosting forwards.

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a case of being able to get out of the level bounds using Titania's Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Mastery Sigil appearing unranked on Titania and her Skins.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being unable to hit enemies from within the Rift when using Titania’s Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed various Syandana clipping issues through Titania’s wings.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Incubus Syandana clipping through Titania’s wings.

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania’s Bullet Jump FX lingering forever.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania’s passive description appearing in Limbo’s.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes: Victims of Titania's Lamplight recover slower in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Titania’s wing clipping through Archwings when viewing anything Archwing-related Codex entries.
Fixed enemies becoming un-tethered with Titania’s Lantern ability and the Ferrox with Tether Grenades equipped.

patchlogs.name: Update 19.13.0
patchlogs.changes: Rifle Amp and Shotgun Amp Auras now apply to Titania’s Dex Pixia weapons.

patchlogs.changes: Titania's Lantern

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.6.0 + 19.6.0.1
patchlogs.additions: Added controller shake to Titania’s Razorwing ability.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4.2 + 19.4.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a hole in the Grineer Tileset where players could escape the level using Titania’s Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4 + 19.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania Solstice skin visual bug after exiting Razorwing

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nezha’s Warding Halo Augment casted on Titania’s Razorflies preventing it from dieing when Razorwing is deactivated as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/720871-titania-razorflies-nezha-warding-halo/

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.changes: Fixed an issue with Titania’s Razorwing ability appearing as ready-to-cast without sufficient energy in Conclave matches.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed not seeing the HUD buff indicator from Titania’s Tribute when joining a mission in progress. 
Fixed the Ripkas not appearing on Titania when equipped as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/691055-ripkas-not-showing-when-equipped-on-titania/
Fixed an issue with emblems clipping when equipped on Titania.
Fixed an issue with multiple Syandanas not fitting properly on Titania.
Fixed Titania’s Razorflies being permanently hostile to allies if Razorwing was cast while under an enemy's Status effect.
Fixed Titania’s Diwata clipping through her body when in Razorwing mode.
Fixed Titania’s Diwata appearing unattached to her body.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Conclave Arsenal now has Ability descriptions specific to Conclave for the following Frames: Ash, Banshee, Hydroid, Inaros, Ivara, Loki, Mag, Mesa, Nekros, Nezha, Nova, Nyx, Rhino, Saryn, Titania, Valkyr, Vauban and Volt.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed melee mods not applying to Titania's Diwata (Razorwing melee weapon).
Fixed Sentinel’s continuing to use their Precepts in the spot where Titania’s Razorwing was cast.

patchlogs.name: The Vacuum Within: Hotfix #3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Titania’s Razorwing ability displaying as ready to cast even though the player does not have 100 energy in Conclave.
Fixed Syndicate Mods not doing their effect for clients after they exit Archwing/Submersible/Titania's Razorwing.
Fixed Titania gaining energy while in Limbo’s Rift and having Razorwing active. 
Fixed the Drahk Master taking Titania’s Razorwing weapons. 
Fixed Shadow Debt Mods applying to Titania’s Razorwing weapons.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Titania’s Razorflies persisting if player leaves while in Razorwing form in Conclave.
Fixed a Host migration resulting in Titania keeping her Razorwing weapons in Conclave.
Fixed shrinking when shaking hands with Titania while her Razorwing is active.
Fixed Titania being stuck in flight mode when running out of Energy during Razorwing as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/690239-unlimited-titania-ult-at-full-size/
Fixed a case where another player spawning with an Aura mod while you were in Titania’s Razorwing would result in you running through the air.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Update 1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed issues with being active in Titania's Razorwing preventing the effects of Tribute buffs and Spellbind self-casts.
Fixed Paracyst’s alt fire not being able to pull ragolled enemies (e.g. From Titania’s Spellbind & Lantern).

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 4
patchlogs.changes: Increased Razorwing's flight speed and reduced damage to Titania on impact and collision with the world.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Titania’s shrine triggering outside of her quest.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed casting Titania’s Spellbind on a player while they are reloading, breaking them and their animation until they melee attack.
Fixed not being able to shoot/damage enemies upon decasting Titania’s Razorwing.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.additions: Trance your enemies with the mystical powers of Lotus’ newest warrior, Titania. Overwhelm your enemies with swarms of butterflies, mesmerize and distract foes with shiny lures and morph into a deadly, flying fairy.
patchlogs.fixes: General FeedbackTitania and The Silver Grove QuestFusion SimplifiedBug Report MegathreadLunaro Additions and ChangesNew Weapons

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: This Quest can be obtained after unlocking Eris. If you do not have this planet, defeat Tyl Regor on Titania, Uranus to collect its Navigation Segment. Players that have Eris already unlocked can accept the Jordas Precept on their Codex.
